title: Chat Support Clerk
description: We are seeking a compassionate, organized, and professional Chat Support Clerk to join our growing remote team at Positive Behavior Steps. In this role you will serve as a key point of digital contact for our clients, families, and partners providing timely, accurate, and empathetic support through our live chat platform. Your communication skills, attention to detail, and genuine passion for helping others will directly reflect the mission and values of our organization. Location: United States (Remote). Key Responsibilities Respond promptly and professionally to inbound client and family inquiries via live chat. Provide accurate information about Positive Behavior Steps' programs, services, and support offerings. Assist clients and families with appointment scheduling, service inquiries, and program navigation. Process and document incoming chat requests, service orders, and client information accurately. Resolve client concerns and complaints with empathy, patience, and professionalism. Accurately log all chat interactions and maintain up-to-date client records in the CRM system. Coordinate with clinical, administrative, and operations teams to escalate and resolve complex client needs. Follow up with clients to confirm resolution and ensure overall satisfaction. Maintain up-to-date knowledge of Positive Behavior Steps' programs, policies, and behavioral health resources. Identify opportunities to improve the client experience and communicate feedback to management. Handle all client information with the highest level of confidentiality and in compliance with HIPAA and applicable privacy regulations. Meet or exceed performance targets including response time, resolution rate, and client satisfaction scores. Provide additional clerical and administrative support to the team as required. Qualifications & Skills High school diploma or equivalent required; degree or certification in healthcare, behavioral health, communications, or a related field is a plus. 0–2 years of experience in customer service, chat support, clerical work, or a healthcare related role. Excellent written communication skills with a warm, empathetic, and professional tone. Strong multitasking ability with the capacity to manage multiple chat conversations simultaneously. Proficiency with live chat platforms, CRM software, and Microsoft Office Suite. Excellent typing speed and accuracy with a minimum of 40–50 WPM. Knowledge of behavioral health, mental health, or social services is highly desirable. Strong problem-solving skills with a genuine passion for client satisfaction and well-being. Comfortable discussing behavioral health topics in a professional, sensitive, and supportive manner. Rel
